events.appearance_notes: Observed event; There are many vehicles on the road above the video. A black car appears from the bottom of the video and leaves from the right side of the video.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; A small white car about to turn left collided with a black car at the bottom of the video.
events.event_text: From 57.2s to 60.9s, a small white car about to turn left collided with a black car at the bottom of the video.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The black car that collided in the video reversed and left the video, and the white car opened the door.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The white car did not close the door and fell backwards for a distance.
events.event_text: From 66.5s to 72.0s, the white car did not close the door and fell backwards for a distance.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The black car behind the white car goes around from behind.
events.event_text: From 70.2s to 75.1s, the black car behind the white car goes around from behind.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; A person got out of the white car, and a person got out of the black car. The two walked to the back of the white car to talk.
events.event_text: From 72.0s to 78.2s, a person got out of the white car, and a person got out of the black car. The two walked to the back of the white car to talk.
